video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild training yard, a masculine young adult frontline adventurer in a short guild cloak, reinforced leather armor, bright scarf, confident stance, visible training scratches, and a feminine mage with layered blue robes, small floating spell tags, neat gloves, focused expression, moonlit Japanese fantasy RPG palette; Kiri Ashbell steps in and guides Kiri Dawncrest through a clear two-person practice stance, warm guild lanterns, readable body action, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same Japanese fantasy RPG guild training yard with warm wood and lanterns, Kiri Ashbell in reinforced leather armor and Kiri Dawncrest in blue mage robes; Kiri Dawncrest responds by matching the stance while Kiri Ashbell steadies the motion, cooperative training rhythm, continuous camera, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The content depicts non-sexual, cooperative physical training between two fantasy characters in a professional guild setting, adhering to safety guidelines.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The frontline adventurer and mage are practicing combat synergy in the training yard to prepare for upcoming patrols.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborative training builds professional trust and mutual respect.
Effective synergy during practice increases reliance on the frontline partner.
